languages.text: "В донесении — лишь предположения губернатор-полковника. Возможно, смерть Погонщицы от вашей руки. Или особый, неизвестный нам цикл. В любом случае представители династии на Заркове уже начали расследование".

"The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."
languages.original_text: "В донесении — лишь предположения губернатор-полковника. Возможно, смерть Погонщицы от вашей руки. Или особый, неизвестный нам цикл. В любом случае представители династии на Заркове уже начали расследование".

"The report only contains the Castellan-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

languages.text: 「この報告書には、城守の推測しか記されていません。原因は、あなたが殺した放牧者の死かもしれません。あるいは、私たちが知らない特別なサイクルかもしれません。いずれにしても、ザルコフの王朝代表はすでに調査を開始しています」
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Castellan-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

traits.locale_text: 「この報告書には、城守の推測しか記されていません。原因は、あなたが殺した放牧者の死かもしれません。あるいは、私たちが知らない特別なサイクルかもしれません。いずれにしても、ザルコフの王朝代表はすでに調査を開始しています。」

languages.text: «El informe solo contiene las conjeturas de{nc| la coronel-gobernadora|l coronel-gobernador}. Puede que la causa fuera la muerte del Pastor a sus manos, o quizá haya un ciclo particular que desconocemos. En cualquier caso, los representantes de la dinastía en el planeta ya han comenzado su investigación».
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

traits.locale_text: «El informe solo contiene las conjeturas de{nc| la coronel-gobernadora|l coronel-gobernador}. Puede que la causa fuera la muerte del Pastor a sus manos, o quizá haya un ciclo particular que desconocemos. En cualquier caso, los representantes de la dinastía en el planeta ya han comenzado su investigación».

languages.text: “目前的报告中仅包含总督上校的推测。可能是您击杀拒生花引发的连锁反应，也可能是某种未知的周期性现象。无论如何，王朝驻扎尔科夫代表已启动全面调查。”
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

traits.locale_text: “目前的报告中仅包含总督上校的推测。可能是您击杀拒生花引发的连锁反应，也可能是某种未知的周期性现象。无论如何，王朝驻扎尔科夫代表已启动全面调查。”

languages.text: "Der Bericht enthält nur die Vermutung {nc|der Colonel-Gouverneurin|des Colonel-Gouverneurs}. Vielleicht war der Tod des Treibers durch Eure Hand der Grund. Oder es gibt einen speziellen Zyklus, von dem wir nichts wissen. Auf jeden Fall haben Vertreter der Dynastie auf Zarkov bereits eine Untersuchung gestartet."
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

traits.locale_text: "Der Bericht enthält nur die Vermutung {nc|der Colonel-Gouverneurin|des Colonel-Gouverneurs}. Vielleicht war der Tod des Treibers durch Eure Hand der Grund. Oder es gibt einen speziellen Zyklus, von dem wir nichts wissen. Auf jeden Fall haben Vertreter der Dynastie auf Zarkov bereits eine Untersuchung gestartet."

languages.text: "Rapor sadece Vali Albay'ın tahminlerini içeriyor. Belki de sebep Çoban'ın elinizde can vermesidir. Ya da bilmediğimiz özel bir döngü vardır. Her hâlükârda Zarkov'daki hanedanlık temsilcileri bir soruşturma başlatmış."
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."

traits.locale_text: "Rapor sadece Vali Albay'ın tahminlerini içeriyor. Belki de sebep Çoban'ın elinizde can vermesidir. Ya da bilmediğimiz özel bir döngü vardır. Her hâlükârda Zarkov'daki hanedanlık temsilcileri bir soruşturma başlatmış."

languages.text: « Le rapport ne contient que des hypothèses {nc|de la gouverneure-colonelle|du gouverneur-colonel}. Peut-être que votre victoire contre le Chasseur en est la cause. Peut-être qu'il s'agit d'un cycle particulier dont nous ignorions l'existence. Quoi qu'il en soit, les représentants de la dynastie présents sur Zarkov ont déjà lancé une enquête. »
languages.original_text: "The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."
